query: light leak halation orange red film overexposed analog
message: anti-aesthetic / clarity_and_focus / film_artifacts: light leaks, halation, overexposed film

response.objective_caption: A close-up view of a flower with radiating petals in warm orange and red tones, featuring visible veining patterns converging toward a central reproductive structure. The petals display a gradient from bright yellow at the core to deeper red at the outer edges. A bright light source appears in the upper portion of the frame.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A heavily blurred close-up of a flower with radiating petals in warm orange and red tones, where intentional soft focus obscures fine detail and creates a dreamy, ethereal atmosphere. The image features extreme overexposure from a bright light source in the upper right that washes out portions of the frame, merging with the soft-focus blur. Visible veining patterns in the petals converge toward the central structure, but the overall impression is one of luminous haze rather than botanical clarity.
